insights.title: All Campaigns Paused — No Active Outreach
insights.detail: All 6 sequences are currently in paused status at client request. Zero active outreach is occurring as of this report period. The client has indicated they need time to review existing performance data before resuming.

insights.title: Significant Member Pipeline Growth
insights.detail: Total members grew from ~266 (107 completed + 159 in-progress) at baseline to 1,715. 652 additional members completed their sequences and 212 more are in-progress during this 30-day period. The Home Inspection Buyers sequence alone holds 585 not-yet-started contacts.

insights.title: 11 New Replies — First Engagement Signals
insights.detail: Baseline had 0 replies — this period produced 11 total replies (5 from the old Insurance sequence, 6 from the Industrial Prospects sequence). While modest, these represent the first direct prospect engagement.

insights.title: Bounce Rate Remains Elevated
insights.detail: 17 new bounces this period (39 total vs 22 baseline). At 2.27% overall bounce rate, this is within acceptable range but warrants monitoring — the Home Inspection Buyers sequence has the highest bounce count (14).

insights.title: Sequence Versioning — Two Duplicates Identified
insights.detail: The Insurance Account Managers sequence exists in both old (x-prefixed) and new versions. Combined they have 656 members, 381 completed, with 5 total replies. The old Industrial sequence (6 replies) is also winding down with 95% completion.

insights.title: No Bookings or Meetings
insights.detail: Across all sequences and all time, zero bookings have been generated. Combined with 0 meetings tracked and no LinkedIn/Prosp data, the pipeline has not yet produced a qualified lead conversation.

nextSteps.detail: AAA Pro Home Inspectors needs to review the campaign performance data before any sequences can be reactivated. Schedule a review call to walk through the 11 replies and discuss which sequences to prioritize.
11 replies have been received but not yet reviewed by the client. These are spread across the old Insurance (5) and Industrial (6) sequences. Review these replies manually to identify any warm leads.
The x-prefixed Insurance and Industrial sequences appear to be legacy versions. Once the (New) Insurance sequence is validated, consider archiving the old versions to reduce clutter.
585 contacts are loaded but not started in the Home Inspection Buyers sequence. When campaigns resume, this sequence should be prioritized — it represents the largest untapped pipeline.
Open and click tracking data is not available for this client. If email engagement metrics are desired for future reports, confirm tracking is enabled at the sequence level.

notes.clientRequest: Campaigns paused per client request — client has not reviewed current data yet.
notes.dataAvailability: Open and click tracking not available. No LinkedIn/Prosp campaigns. Meeting data tracked client-side.
